last_reasoning: The initial setup of the BudE system requires creation of core files and directories. The agent files will be used to develop the coder, researcher, system architect, and crypto analyst agents. The dashboard index.html file will provide a basic interface for human interaction. The memory.json file will store evolution history and decisions.

tasks.text: Implement research functionality in researcher agent
Implement coding functionality in coder agent
Implement crypto analysis functionality in crypto analyst agent
Implement system design functionality in system architect agent
